channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — June 1, 2026
item.description: Salvation is nothing more than “right-mindedness,” which is not the One-Mindedness of the Soul, but which must be accomplished before the One- Mindedness can be restored. Right-mindedness dictates the next step automatically because right perception is uniformly without attack, so that wrong-mindedness is obliterated. The ego cannot survive without judgement, and is laid aside accordingly.The mind

item.title: Lesson 43: “God is my Source. I cannot see apart from Him.”
item.description: “God is my Source. I cannot see apart from Him.” Perception is not an attribute of God. His is the realm of knowledge. Yet He has created the Holy Spirit as the Mediator between perception and knowledge. Without this link with God, perception would have replaced knowledge forever in your minds.With this link with God, perception will become so changed and purified that it will lead to knowledge.Th
